trackHistoryLabel: 2025 Austrian Grand Prix: Lando Norris · McLaren

Kimi Antonelli.note: Mercedes has the strongest current team form, so Kimi Antonelli stays high in the model.

Lando Norris.note: Lando Norris gets the biggest track-history boost as last year's race winner.

Max Verstappen.note: Max Verstappen needs Red Bull Racing to outperform its current team-form score.
